inputs.label: Purchase Price
inputs.businessContext: Initial cost of the vehicle. Based on market value and invoice price.

inputs.label: Residual Value
inputs.businessContext: Estimated value at end of depreciation period. Often based on industry guides like Kelley Blue Book.

inputs.label: Useful Life
inputs.businessContext: Expected service life. IRS guidelines for MACRS or straight-line depreciation.

inputs.label: Depreciation Method
inputs.businessContext: Standard accounting methods per GAAP and IFRS.

inputs.label: Annual Mileage
inputs.businessContext: Average miles driven per year. Affects wear and tear depreciation.

inputs.label: Annual Maintenance Cost
inputs.businessContext: Expected yearly maintenance expenses. Based on vehicle age and condition.

inputs.label: Fuel Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Miles per gallon. Affects operating cost and indirectly depreciation.

inputs.label: Fuel Price per Gallon
inputs.businessContext: Current average fuel cost. Used for total cost of ownership.

inputs.label: Annual Insurance Cost
inputs.businessContext: Yearly insurance premium. Varies by vehicle value and risk.

inputs.label: Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Sales tax rate applied to purchase. Based on local jurisdiction.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in input data accuracy. Used for risk adjustment.

thresholds.maintenanceCost > 5000: High maintenance cost indicates potential reliability issues.
thresholds.fuelEfficiency < 15: Low fuel efficiency increases operating cost.
thresholds.dataConfidence < 50: Low data confidence may affect accuracy.

formulas.annualDepreciation: if depreciationMethod == 'straight-line' then (purchasePrice - residualValue) / usefulLife else if depreciationMethod == 'declining-balance' then (purchasePrice - accumulatedDepreciation) * (2 / usefulLife) else if depreciationMethod == 'sum-of-years-digits' then (purchasePrice - residualValue) * (usefulLife - year + 1) / (usefulLife * (usefulLife + 1) / 2)

suggestedActions: Consider reducing annual mileage to slow depreciation.
Perform regular maintenance to avoid high repair costs.
Improve fuel efficiency by driving habits or vehicle choice.
Verify input data sources to increase confidence.
